# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-flask-api
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-flask-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-flask-api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flask-app
        image: your-docker-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 5000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: python-flask-api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: python-flask-api
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 5000
  type: LoadBalancer
